   107	      trailing: log.type != ActivityType.manualPause
   108	          ? Text(
   109	              '${log.interval.inSeconds}s',
   110	              style: const TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16),
   111	            )
   112	          : const Text('-', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey)),
   113	    );
   114	  }
   115	
   116	  IconData _iconForType(ActivityType type) {
   117	    switch (type) {
   118	      case ActivityType.manualPause:
   119	        return Icons.pause_circle_filled;
   120	      case ActivityType.c1Click:
   121	        return Icons.stop;
   122	      case ActivityType.c2Click:
   123	        return Icons.change_history;
   124	      case ActivityType.tryClick:
   125	      case ActivityType.unknown:
   126	        return Icons.circle;
   127	    }
   128	  }
   129	
   130	  String _labelForType(ActivityType type) {
   131	    switch (type) {
   132	      case ActivityType.manualPause:
   133	        return l10n.pauseReset;
   134	      case ActivityType.c1Click:
   135	        return l10n.c1Click;
   136	      case ActivityType.c2Click:
   137	        return l10n.c2Click;
   138	      case ActivityType.tryClick:
   139	        return l10n.tryError;
   140	      case ActivityType.unknown:
   141	        return l10n.unknown;
   142	    }
   143	  }
   144	}

     1	import 'package:fish_counter/constants.dart';
     2	import 'package:fish_counter/l10n/app_localizations.dart';
     3	import 'package:fish_counter/models/activity_log.dart';
     4	import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
     5	
     6	class AnalyticsTimelineSection extends StatelessWidget {
     7	  const AnalyticsTimelineSection({
     8	    super.key,
     9	    required this.activityLogs,
    10	    required this.l10n,
    11	  });
    12	
    13	  final List<ActivityLog> activityLogs;
    14	  final AppLocalizations l10n;
    15	
    16	  @override
    17	  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    18	    return Column(
    19	      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
    20	      children: [
    21	        Text(
    22	          l10n.activityTimeline,
    23	          style: const TextStyle(
    24	            fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
    25	            color: Colors.orange,
    26	          ),
    27	        ),
    28	        const SizedBox(height: 10),
    29	        if (activityLogs.isEmpty)
    30	          Padding(
    31	            padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 20),
    32	            child: Center(
    33	              child: Text(
    34	                l10n.noActivityRecorded,
    35	                style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey.shade600),
    36	              ),
    37	            ),
    38	          )
    39	        else
    40	          Column(
    41	            children: _bucketedLogs()
    42	                .entries
    43	                .expand(
    44	                  (entry) => [
    45	                    _bucketHeader(entry.key, entry.value.length),
    46	                    ...entry.value.map(_eventTile),
    47	                  ],
    48	                )
    49	                .toList(),
    50	          ),
    51	        const SizedBox(height: 40),
    52	      ],
    53	    );
    54	  }
    55	
    56	
    57	  Map<String, List<ActivityLog>> _bucketedLogs() {
    58	    final buckets = <String, List<ActivityLog>>{};
    59	    for (final log in activityLogs) {
    60	      buckets.putIfAbsent(_bucketLabel(log), () => []).add(log);
    61	    }
    62	    return buckets;
    63	  }
    64	
    65	  String _bucketLabel(ActivityLog log) {
    66	    final parts = log.timestamp.split(':');
    67	    if (parts.length >= 2) return '${parts[0]}:${parts[1]}';
    68	    return log.timestamp;
    69	  }
    70	
    71	  Widget _bucketHeader(String label, int count) {
    72	    return Padding(
    73	      padding: const EdgeInsets.only(top: 10, bottom: 4),
    74	      child: Row(
    75	        children: [
    76	          Text(
    77	            label,
    78	            style: const TextStyle(
    79	              color: Colors.white70,
    80	              fontSize: 12,
    81	              fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
    82	            ),
    83	          ),
    84	          const SizedBox(width: 8),
    85	          Text(
    86	            '$count events',
    87	            style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey.shade600, fontSize: 11),
    88	          ),
    89	        ],
    90	      ),
    91	    );
    92	  }
    93	
    94	  Widget _eventTile(ActivityLog log) {
    95	    final status = log.type == ActivityType.manualPause ? Status.pause : log.status;
    96	    return ListTile(
    97	      contentPadding: EdgeInsets.zero,
    98	      leading: Icon(_iconForType(log.type), color: status.toColor()),
    99	      title: Text(
   100	        _labelForType(log.type),
   101	        style: const TextStyle(fontSize: 14),
   102	      ),
   103	      subtitle: Text(
   104	        log.timestamp,
   105	        style: const TextStyle(fontSize: 11),
   106	      ),
   107	      trailing: log.type != ActivityType.manualPause
   108	          ? Text(
   109	              '${log.interval.inSeconds}s',
   110	              style: const TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16),
   111	            )
   112	          : const Text('-', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey)),
   113	    );
   114	  }
   115	
   116	  IconData _iconForType(ActivityType type) {
   117	    switch (type) {
   118	      case ActivityType.manualPause:
   119	        return Icons.pause_circle_filled;
   120	      case ActivityType.c1Click:
   121	        return Icons.stop;
   122	      case ActivityType.c2Click:
   123	        return Icons.change_history;
   124	      case ActivityType.tryClick:
   125	      case ActivityType.unknown:
   126	        return Icons.circle;
   127	    }
   128	  }
   129	
   130	  String _labelForType(ActivityType type) {
   131	    switch (type) {
   132	      case ActivityType.manualPause:
   133	        return l10n.pauseReset;
   134	      case ActivityType.c1Click:
   135	        return l10n.c1Click;
   136	      case ActivityType.c2Click:
   137	        return l10n.c2Click;
   138	      case ActivityType.tryClick:
   139	        return l10n.tryError;
   140	      case ActivityType.unknown:
   141	        return l10n.unknown;
   142	    }
   143	  }
   144	}

content.thinking:
**Evaluating timeline bugs**

I need to look into a potential bug in the timeline related to using a Column with all tiles and no scrolling feature.
